codeReview.summary: The commit captures the intended startup-prewarm slice and includes focused diagnostics/metrics/tests, but it fails the feature contract because it also commits an unrelated stale-data cache-revision change outside the prewarm file set and its scope.

issues.description: This feature was supposed to finalize the pre-existing startup-prewarm working-tree slice only, but the commit also edits stale-data cache revision behavior by manually incrementing `app!.marketDataRuntimeState.hotDataRevision`. That change is unrelated to startup prewarm finalization, so the implementation does not satisfy the requirement to create a clean commit containing only startup-prewarm code and tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Runtime shared-state guidance documents the startup prewarm diagnostics and metrics surfaces, but it does not capture the feature-scoping rule that the startup-prewarm finalization slice must exclude unrelated working-tree changes like stale-data regression adjustments. Future cleanup/finalization workers could benefit from an explicit note that 'finalize existing working tree slice' tasks must restage only files directly belonging to that slice.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature description in /home/whoami/.factory/missions/535b983d-b72a-4bff-ba31-9473c53ea1ce/features.json requires 'a clean implementation commit containing only the startup-prewarm code and tests', while commit f5bde92 also changes tests/stale-data.test.ts:78.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit f5bde92 for startup-prewarm-finalization. The prewarm implementation itself looks coherent, but the feature must fail scrutiny because the commit is not cleanly scoped: it includes an unrelated stale-data cache-revision test change despite the mission requiring only the existing startup-prewarm file set.
